description: Style NoteA wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler has perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes using classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Product DetailsBrown belt, has a tang clasp, holes to customise Fit, a fixed loop near the buckle to hold the belt in place and a brand patch in the centre Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
